usa: We place students in top US universities including MIT, Stanford, UC Berkeley, Purdue, and NYU. You need SAT or ACT for undergrad, GRE or GMAT for postgrad, plus TOEFL or Duolingo English Test. F-1 student visa required. Tuition ranges from Rs.20-80L per year.
uk: UK is home to Oxford, Cambridge, Imperial, and LSE. You need IELTS 6.5 or higher and a Student Visa. One-year Master programmes make UK a time-efficient and prestigious option. Tuition: Rs.20-50L per year.
europe: Europe offers some of the best value in higher education. Germany, Netherlands, and France have world-class universities with low or no tuition fees. TU Munich, ETH Zurich, Delft, and Sciences Po are among our top placements. IELTS or CAE-C1 usually required.
ielts: IELTS tests Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking. Scores range from 1 to 9 bands. Most universities require 6.5 to 7.5. We offer intensive 6-week coaching aiming for 1 to 1.5 band improvement.
toefl: TOEFL iBT is scored 0 to 120. Most US universities require 90 to 100 or above. Our coaching focuses on integrated tasks and note-taking skills unique to this exam. Target: 100 plus.
sat: The digital SAT scores 400 to 1600. Our 12-week programme has helped students improve by 200 to 300 points. Target: 1450 plus.
cae: CAE C1 Advanced is a Cambridge English exam accepted by UK and European universities. It tests Reading and Use of English, Writing, Listening, and Speaking. Particularly valued by UK universities. Target: Grade B or above.
duolingo: Duolingo English Test is accepted by 5000 plus institutions. Taken at home in under an hour, results in 2 days. Great budget-friendly alternative. Target: 120 plus.
visa: We have a 98 percent plus visa approval rate. We handle documentation, financial proof, DS-160 filing, and mock visa interviews for F-1 USA, Student Visa UK, and Schengen Europe.
scholarship: We help identify 500 plus scholarships worldwide. Our students have collectively secured over Rs.15 Crore in scholarships. We assist with essays and deadline management.
sop: We craft compelling Statements of Purpose through multiple drafts. Your unique story told in a voice that resonates with admissions readers. Also Personal Statements, Diversity Essays, and Research Proposals.
fees: Our consultation is 100 percent free. Service fees vary by package. Book a free call and we will walk you through exact pricing with no hidden charges.
appointment: Book a free consultation by scrolling to the contact form on this page and filling it in. We will confirm your slot within 24 hours. Or call us at plus 91 89259 65118.
hi: Hello! I am the Northgate AI Assistant. I can help with USA, UK, and European university admissions, IELTS, TOEFL, SAT, CAE coaching, scholarships, visas, and more. What would you like to know?
fallback: Thanks for your question! I can help with destinations like USA, UK, and Europe, exams like IELTS, TOEFL, SAT, and CAE C1, visa processes, scholarships, SOPs, and fees. For personalised advice, book a free consultation with our counselors!
